features.description: Single-file grep/egrep/fgrep now satisfies the read-before-edit check, so a separate Read is no longer required.
features.reference_changelog_line: Edit no longer requires a separate Read after viewing a file with `grep`: single-file `grep`/`egrep`/`fgrep` commands now satisfy the read-before-edit check

features.description: Background-session teardown now sends SIGTERM to running shell subprocesses before SIGKILL so cleanup handlers run.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved background-session teardown (`claude rm`/`stop`, idle reap) to send SIGTERM to running shell subprocesses before SIGKILL, so cleanup handlers run

features.description: Dynamic-workflow trigger keyword renamed from `workflow` to `ultracode`; the word `workflow` is no longer a trigger.
features.reference_changelog_line: Renamed the dynamic-workflow trigger keyword from `workflow` to `ultracode`. The word "workflow" no longer triggers a run; asking for one in your own words still works. The trigger keyword is highlighted in violet in the prompt input

features.description: Now prompts before writing to shell startup files (.zshenv, .zlogin, .bash_login) and ~/.config/git/ to avoid unintended
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a prompt before writing to shell startup files (`.zshenv`, `.zlogin`, `.bash_login`) and `~/.config/git/`, which could otherwise lead to unintended command execution

features.description: acceptEdits mode now prompts before writing build-tool config files granting code execution (.npmrc, bunfig.toml, .bazel
features.reference_changelog_line: `acceptEdits` mode now prompts before writing build-tool config files that grant code execution (`.npmrc`, `.yarnrc*`, `bunfig.toml`, `.bazelrc`, `.pre-commit-config.yaml`, `.devcontainer/`, etc.)

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE environment variable removed and is now a no-op.
features.reference_changelog_line: Removed `CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE`; the environment variable is now a no-op
